nasb.text: Again, when a wicked man turns away from his wickedness which he has committed and practices justice and righteousness, he will save his life.

esv.text: Again, when a wicked person turns away from the wickedness he has committed and does what is just and right, he shall save his life.

cnv.text: 還有，惡人若回轉離開他所行的惡，行正直公義的事，他就可以使自己的性命存活。

ccb.text: 倘若恶人离恶行义，他必救回自己的性命。
